manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are a customer of a travel agency. Here is a description of the details of the travel you want to make:

WHAT: Travel
FROM: Stockholm
TO: Vienna
BY: Rented Car
CLASS: The most comfortable
WHEN: On April 10

The travel agent does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the travel agent will start with TRAVEL-AGENT. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

ANSWER: I wish to start my journey on April 10.
TRAVEL-AGENT: Where do you want to depart from?
ANSWER: I want to depart from Stockholm.
TRAVEL-AGENT: Do you want a specific kind of transport?
ANSWER: Yes, I require a rented car.
TRAVEL-AGENT: Do you have a preference for class?
ANSWER: I prefer the most comfortable class.
ME:  Have you told the travel agent where you are leaving from? Answer this question with yes or no and then stop.

You are a customer of a travel agency. Here is a description of the details of the travel you want to make:

WHAT: Travel
FROM: Stockholm
TO: Vienna
BY: Rented Car
CLASS: The most comfortable
WHEN: On April 10

The travel agent does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the travel agent will start with TRAVEL-AGENT. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

manipulated_prompt_obj.content: Ok.
manipulated_prompt_obj.label: pseudo

manipulated_prompt_obj.content: TRAVEL-AGENT: When do you wish to start your journey?
ANSWER: I wish to start my journey on April 10.
TRAVEL-AGENT: Where do you want to depart from?
ANSWER: I want to depart from Stockholm.
TRAVEL-AGENT: Do you want a specific kind of transport?
ANSWER: Yes, I require a rented car.
TRAVEL-AGENT: Do you have a preference for class?
ANSWER: I prefer the most comfortable class.
ME:  Have you told the travel agent where you want to go to? Answer this question with yes or no and then stop.

manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are a customer of a travel agency. Here is a description of the details of the travel you want to make:

WHAT: Travel
FROM: Stockholm
TO: Vienna
BY: Rented Car
CLASS: The most comfortable
WHEN: On April 10

The travel agent does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the travel agent will start with TRAVEL-AGENT. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.
manipulated_prompt_obj.label: pseudo

manipulated_prompt_obj.content: Ok.
manipulated_prompt_obj.label: pseudo

manipulated_prompt_obj.content: TRAVEL-AGENT: When do you wish to start your journey?
ANSWER: I wish to start my journey on April 10.
TRAVEL-AGENT: Where do you want to depart from?
ANSWER: I want to depart from Stockholm.
TRAVEL-AGENT: Do you want a specific kind of transport?
ANSWER: Yes, I require a rented car.
TRAVEL-AGENT: Do you have a preference for class?
ANSWER: I prefer the most comfortable class.
ME: Please answer this question carefully. If I asked the travel agent when are you travelling, would he or she know the answer? Answer this question with yes or no and then stop.
